Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label

Enum Class OriginTermLabel.SpecType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<OriginTermLabel.SpecType>
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.OriginTermLabel.SpecType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<OriginTermLabel.SpecType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
OriginTermLabel
public static enum OriginTermLabel.SpecType extends Enum<OriginTermLabel.SpecType>
A SpecType is any type of JML specification which gets translated into JavaDL.
See Also:

    • ASSIGNABLE

      public static final OriginTermLabel.SpecType ASSIGNABLE
      assignable. The name 'assignable' is kept here for legacy reasons. Note that KeY does only verify what can be modified (i.e., what is 'modifiable').

    • ASSIGNABLE_FREE

      public static final OriginTermLabel.SpecType ASSIGNABLE_FREE
      assignable_free The name 'assignable' is kept here for legacy reasons. Note that KeY does only verify what can be modified (i.e., what is 'modifiable').

    • USER_INTERACTION

      public static final OriginTermLabel.SpecType USER_INTERACTION
      Interaction. Used for terms entered by the user.

    • NONE

      public static final OriginTermLabel.SpecType NONE
      None. Used when no other spec type fits and for terms whose origin was not set upon their creation.
